name: What docs prove GEO negligence by a marketing agency?

mainEntity.name: What docs prove GEO negligence by a marketing agency?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Contracts unmet KPIs, analytics showing no AI citations, competitor benchmarks.**[9] **Key factors:** 1. Promised vs. delivered. 2. Breach terms. **Log communications, sue for restitution if clear.**[1] Gather now.[3]
